channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Virtua Fighter Crossroads Revealed At Summer Games Fest
item.content:encoded:
The next Virtua Fighter game has been officially revealed, and it’s a large open-world experience.

During Summer Games Fest 2026, Virtua Fighter Crossroads was announced and showed off its open-world concept in a massive trailer.

Cielo was featured prominently in the trailer, showcasing single-player gameplay that looked much more like Yakuza than a traditional Virtua Fighter. The game will release in 2027, but a full release date was not shown. More details will be shown at an official showcase for the game later this evening at 8:00 p.m. ET.

The Story will be updated in time.

Check out everything announced here. Sound off about this story and all others on our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Star Wars Zero Company Receives Gameplay Premiere During Summer Game Fest

The first gameplay trailer for Star Wars Zero Company was revealed during Summer Game Fest, as well as an official release date.

SAW: Genesis Announced During Summer Game Fest

SAW: Genesis, a 3 vs 1 survival horror game based on the SAW franchise, has been announced during Summer Game Fest.

End of Abyss Release Date Revealed

The release date for End of Abyss has been revealed by Section 9 Interactive at Summer Game Fest 2026. Here are more details.

Gundam Rogue Orbit Release Window Revealed

A new Gundam game called Rogue Orbit was revealed by Bandai Namco at Summer Game Fest. Here are more details.



https://insider-gaming.com/virtua-fighter-crossroads-revealed-at-summer-games-fest/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Star Wars Zero Company Receives Gameplay Premiere & Release Date During Summer Game Fest
item.content:encoded:
A world-first look at gameplay was shown for Star Wars Zero Company during Summer Game Fest, with a release date confirmed for August 27, 2026.

Star Wars Zero Company was confirmed to appear at the Summer showcase prior to the event, and the trailer was as impressive as expected.

Gameplay Details For Star Wars Zero Company

In case you were unfamiliar, Star Wars Zero Company is a new single-player turn-based tactics game developed by Bit Reactor, who have built a team that’s worked on franchises like XCOM and Civilisation; to say they’re masters of the genre would be an understatement.

Set in the twilight of the Clone Wars, you’ll assume the role of Hawks, a fully voiced and customizable protagonist in charge of the intelligence unit. Alongside them, you’ll build a ragtag team ready to fight the separatist forces, including the likes of battle droids, droidekas, and a whole host of Star Wars aliens.

The new trailer showcased the XCOM-centric gameplay, and if you’re a fan of the franchise, you’ll feel right at home with Star Wars Zero Company. With a deeper narrative, risk of permadeath, and a large-scale war to fight, the game looks like a treat for Star Wars fans looking for a gritty Clone Wars adventure. Oh, and Anakin was showcased—what more do you need?!

Check out the new gameplay trailer for yourself below:

This was just one of the many announcements during Summer Game Fest. If you’re looking to stay up to date on everything else, check out our live updates for the showcase here.

What do you think of Star Wars Zero Company? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the drop off for Nintendo Switch 2 sales in Japan, as well as when the Steam Machine is set to ship.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: End of Abyss Release Date Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Section 9 Interactive has revealed at Summer Game Fest 2026 that End of Abyss will release in October of this year.

End of Abyss is a single-player action-adventure developed by Section 9 Interactive and published by Epic Games. The developers have finally confirmed a release date for the title: End of Abyss arrives on October 1, 2026. Interested readers can pre-order the game now on XBOX Series X/S and PC.

About End of Abyss

“End of Abyss” is a game that puts you in the role of a combat technician named Cel. As you explore the derelict areas of a mysterious underground facility, you will gradually uncover the secrets of its origins while battling some of the most dangerous monsters. Players must investigate disturbances of unknown origin that spiral deeper into an abandoned world as they navigate the compound.

The journey will require players to upgrade their gear and adapt to the environment as they progress. There are various branching paths and hidden areas that can be revealed using your Scanner and other tools. These pathways will become accessible once players gain more power, allowing them to revisit forgotten corridors and uncover secrets that were previously sealed away.

In other news, a new Gundam game called Rogue Orbit was revealed by Bandai Namco at Summer Game Fest. Additionally, Paramount Games has revealed a new Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles title called The Last Ronin. What are your thoughts on End of Abyss releasing in October 2026? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Guild Wars 3 being announced at Summer Game Fest. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

Gundam Rogue Orbit Release Window Revealed

A new Gundam game called Rogue Orbit was revealed by Bandai Namco at Summer Game Fest. Here are more details.

Guild Wars 3 Announced During Summer Game Fest

Guild Wars 3 has been announced during Summer Game Fest 2026, with it being the first new title in the MMO franchise in over a decade.

Crossfire Announced During Summer Game Fest

Crossfire, a new third-person narrative adventure, has been officially revealed during Summer Game Fest.

Paramount Games Announces New Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Game

Paramount Games is here. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is owned by the Paramount Global Corporation. Now, a new TMNT game is in the works.

item.title: Gundam Rogue Orbit Release Window Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Bandai Namco revealed a brand new game for one of the most popular sci-fi franchises out there, with Gundam Rogue Orbit arriving in 2027.

The reveal started with what looks like a cinematic trailer, with Gundam finally coming to save the day. However, things quickly changed as the trailer transitioned from cutscene moments to proper gameplay, with the Gundam taking on proper colossal creatures across different environments.

The trailer begins with a shot of sunflowers swaying in the wind, which quickly escalates into chaos. A massive creature appears to be attacking a space station, and viewers are shown various types of armored robots attempting to confront it. However, none of the robots succeed in their mission, leading Gundam to step in and confront the creature to restore order.

The new trailer provided players with a glimpse of the story behind the upcoming title, but the standout features were definitely the gameplay mechanics. Viewers got to experience the various types of attacks and weapons that players will have at their disposal, with a massive sword being highlighted prominently. Additionally, the trailer offered insights into the types of enemies players will face, which appear quite formidable. Check out the trailer for Gundam Rogue Orbit below:

In other news, Guild Wars 3 has been announced during Summer Game Fest 2026, with it being the first new title in the MMO franchise in over a decade. Additionally, Crossfire, a new third-person narrative adventure, has been officially revealed during Summer Game Fest. What are your thoughts on Gundam Rogue Orbit’s reveal trailer? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about gen ATLAS being revealed at Summer Game Fest 2026. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
